blocks.text: Prepaid expenses and other current assets consists of the following:
Research and development investment tax credits 3,862 3,353
Total prepaid expenses and other current assets $ 25,871 $ 15,302
Property and equipment, net, consists of the following:
(1) Includes construction costs capitalized related to build-to-suit facilities:
As of March 31, 2019 and 2018, the U.S. build-to-suit facility includes company-funded building improvements of $5.2 million and $4.5 million,

respectively. In March 2019, the Company derecognized the U.K. build-to-suit facility upon substantial completion of construction. See Note 12 for further details. (2) Includes property and equipment acquired under capital leases:
Depreciation and amortization expense was $25.2 million, $17.5 million, and $11.8 million for the years ended March 31, 2019, 2018 and 2017,

respectively. Depreciation and amortization expense in the years ended March 31, 2019, 2018 and 2017 included $1.2 million, $0.9 million and $0.1 million related to property and equipment acquired under capital leases.
